scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Road surface & markings**: Cracked, worn asphalt road with visible tire marks. Curb on the left edge is light gray. Right-hand traffic (vehicles parked and driving on the right side).  
- **Vehicles**: A gray sedan parked on the far right edge. A yellow and blue bus (rear visible, blue lower section, yellow upper section) parked adjacent to the gray sedan.  
- **Text & signs**: A white sign with partial Latin text “LLAGE” (in black, capital letters) and Arabic script (partially visible) mounted on a structure to the right of the bus.  

### Midground  
- **Vehicles**: Multiple parked cars on the left side of the road: dark blue sedan, black sedan, red car, and others. A silver car driving toward the camera on the left lane. License plates on all vehicles are blurred.  
- **Text & signs**: A red circular “no entry” sign (red border, white background, red horizontal bar) mounted on a utility pole near the center-left (midground). A blue sign with white Arabic script on the facade of a building at the center background (text partially obscured).  
- **Infrastructure**: Wooden/metal utility poles with multiple overhead wires spanning the street (left side, midground). A metal street lamp with a cylindrical lamp head mounted on the sidewalk near the center-left building.  
- **Buildings & architecture**: A 5-story beige concrete building (center background) with flat roof, rectangular windows, and air conditioners. The building’s ground floor has a white facade and dark entrance. To the left, a 4-5 story building with large glass windows and a partial awning.  

### Background  
- **Buildings & architecture**: Multi-story beige concrete buildings (3-5 floors) with uniform windows, flat roofs, and some air conditioners. A construction crane (metal, with a long boom) visible in the top-right background. A metal fence with rectangular gray panels on the right edge (near the “LLAGE” sign).  
- **Vegetation**: Dense green bushes and trees along the left sidewalk (background).  
- **Road surface & markings**: The road continues with the same cracked asphalt condition. No distinct lane markings (dashed/solid lines) are visible.  
- **Infrastructure**: Additional utility poles with overhead wires (left and center background).  

### Sky & Atmosphere  
- **Sky**: Partly cloudy with patches of blue sky.  

### All Details (Factual, No Inference)  
- **Text**: “LLAGE” (Latin script, black, capital letters on white sign); red circular “no entry” sign (no text); blue sign with white Arabic script (text not fully legible); partial Arabic script on the right-side sign.  
- **No visible objects**: Traffic lights, fire hydrants, bollards, guardrails (beyond the metal fence), or crosswalk markings.  
- **No absent objects mentioned**: Only elements explicitly visible are described.

details.name: white sign
details.reason: The combination of Arabic script and Latin text is a strong indicator of a Middle Eastern or North African country.
details.focused_description:
The white sign is rectangular with a white background. Visible text includes the English partial word "LLAGE" (the "V" is cut off, indicating the full word is likely "VILLAGE") and multiple lines of Arabic script. The Arabic text lines are:  
"الدف: شركة للق"  
"نومينو و شرف"  
"الكامل: شرك"  
"بالنظام و لغ"  
"رقم: رخصة"  

The sign's text is dark (black or dark gray) on the white background. The material appears to be a printed board, typical for such signs. The condition shows slight blurring but the text remains legible.

details.name: yellow and blue bus
details.reason: The specific color livery of this bus can be a characteristic identifier for a local transit authority.
details.focused_description: The yellow and blue bus features a rectangular shape with a yellow upper body and blue lower body. The rear has a large window with greenish fabric curtains, two red circular taillights on each side, and a red-and-white diagonal striped decal on the rear bumper. A small rectangular black element is centered below the rear window. The bus appears to be made of metal, showing signs of use. No legible text is visible on the bus itself.

details.name: utility poles
details.reason: The presence of multiple overhead wires is a common feature in many Middle Eastern urban areas.
details.focused_description: Two wooden utility poles. The central pole is tall, cylindrical, weathered brown, with multiple black electrical wires, metal cross-arms, and ceramic insulators. The left utility pole is cylindrical, weathered brown, with attached electrical wires. Both show signs of aging and outdoor exposure.

details.name: street lamp
details.reason: The cylindrical lamp head is a specific detail of local street lighting.
details.focused_description: The street lamp features a dark-colored (likely black or dark gray) lamp head mounted on a vertical metallic pole. The lamp head is elongated and extends horizontally from the pole. The pole appears to be made of metal, showing a grayish tone. No text is visible on the street lamp. The lamp head has a smooth, cylindrical shape with a slightly flared end, typical of standard street lighting fixtures. The overall condition appears functional with no visible damage.

details.name: concrete building
details.reason: The architecture, featuring flat roofs and air conditioners, is characteristic of warmer, arid regions.
details.focused_description: A multi-story concrete building with a light beige, weathered facade showing vertical water stains. The structure has a rectangular shape with arched and rectangular windows; some windows are covered with closed shutters, while others are open. Air conditioning units are mounted on the exterior. The ground floor features a lighter-colored concrete or stone facade, and the number "170" in green is visible on the lower portion. The building has a flat roof with a metal railing, and the surface texture is rough, typical of concrete construction.
